input: Create an interactive map module. It should display a map view using Leaflet.js with OpenStreetMap tiles. Support adding markers with title and description popups, drawing circles to highlight areas, and a location search bar. Include a sidebar listing all markers with click-to-center functionality. Support marker categories with color-coded pins.
hint: Use leaflet package. Initialize map with L.map(). Add tile layer from OpenStreetMap. Markers via L.marker([lat, lng]).bindPopup(). Circles via L.circle(). Geocoding search can use Nominatim API format. Category colors via custom icon with different-colored markers. MSS: contentType geo, structure collection, mechanics filter, boundary ask, scale 3.

**Features:**
- **Leaflet map** with OpenStreetMap tiles, click-to-place location selection
- **Markers** with title, description, and category — color-coded pin icons with popups
- **6 categories** (Default, Food & Drink, Nature, Culture, Transport, Danger) each with distinct colors
- **Circles** to highlight areas with custom radius, color, and label
- **Location search** bar using Nominatim geocoding — results are clickable to pan the map
- **Sidebar** listing all markers grouped by category, with click-to-center and delete buttons
- **Category filter** dropdown to show only markers of a specific type
- **Dark-themed sidebar** UI with modal forms for adding markers and circles

input.content:
---
name: interactive-map
description: Interactive Leaflet map with categorized markers, circle highlights, search, and sidebar navigation
metadata:
  contentType: geo
  structure: collection
  boundary: ask
  scale: "2"
---

# Interactive Map

An interactive map module built on Leaflet.js with OpenStreetMap tiles. Users can add markers with titles, descriptions, and color-coded categories. Circles can be drawn to highlight areas of interest. A search bar geocodes locations to pan the map. The sidebar lists all markers grouped by category with click-to-center navigation.

## Features

- **Markers**: Add, edit, and delete markers with title, description, and category
- **Categories**: Color-coded pin categories (Default, Food & Drink, Nature, Culture, Transport, Danger)
- **Circles**: Draw circle overlays to highlight geographic areas with custom radius and color
- **Search**: Location search bar using Nominatim geocoding to find and pan to places
- **Sidebar**: Lists all markers grouped by category; click any marker to center the map on it
- **Filter**: Filter markers by category in the sidebar

## API Endpoints

- `GET /` — Serves the map UI
- `GET /api/markers` — List all markers (optional `?category=` filter)
- `POST /api/markers` — Create a marker `{ title, description, lat, lng, category }`
- `DELETE /api/markers/:id` — Remove a marker
- `GET /api/circles` — List all circles
- `POST /api/circles` — Create a circle `{ lat, lng, radius, color, label }`
- `DELETE /api/circles/:id` — Remove a circle
- `GET /api/categories` — List available categories
- `GET /api/search?q=` — Geocode a location query

**Features:**

- **Markers** with title, description, and category — color-coded pin icons with popups
- **6 categories** (Default, Food & Drink, Nature, Culture, Transport, Danger) each with distinct colors
- **Circles** to highlight areas with custom radius, color, and label
- **Location search** bar using Nominatim geocoding — results are clickable to pan the map
- **Sidebar** listing all markers grouped by category, with click-to-center and delete buttons
- **Category filter** dropdown to show only markers of a specific type
- **Dark-themed sidebar** UI with modal forms for adding markers and circles
